Adam Hlozek.note: Czechia's roaming forward, useful for dropping between lines, combining near Schick, and turning loose balls into shots.
Adam Hlozek.noteZh: 亚当·赫洛热克是捷克游动型前锋，能回撤到线间、在希克身边配合，并把松散球权转化为射门。

Alexandr Sojka.note: Czechia's young midfield passer, helping them keep possession connected and escape pressure through short combinations.
Alexandr Sojka.noteZh: 亚历山大·索伊卡是捷克年轻中场传球手，能帮助球队保持控球连接，并通过短传配合摆脱压力。

David Doudera.note: Czechia's right-side runner, giving them repeated overlaps, early delivery, and enough stamina to recover after attacks.
David Doudera.noteZh: 大卫·杜德拉是捷克右路跑动点，能反复套边、早早传中，并有体能在进攻后回追。

David Jurasek.note: Czechia's left-back outlet, stretching the flank with width, crossing from deeper zones, and recovering into the back line.
David Jurasek.noteZh: 大卫·尤拉塞克是捷克左后卫出口，能用宽度拉开边路、从更深位置传中，并回收到防线。

David Zima.note: Czechia's composed centre-back, useful for aerial clearances, simple first passes, and keeping the defensive line organized.
David Zima.noteZh: 大卫·齐马是捷克沉稳中卫，能完成空中解围、送出简洁第一传，并保持防线组织。

Denis Visinsky.note: Czechia's creative midfield spark, bringing quick combinations, late runs, and fresh ideas when a match tightens.
Denis Visinsky.noteZh: 丹尼斯·维辛斯基是捷克中场创造火花，能带来快速配合、后插上跑动，并在比赛变紧时提供新想法。

Hugo Sochurek.summary: Hugo Sochůrek is a Czechia central midfielder from Sparta Prague who adds youthful passing range, pressure resistance, and long-term upside to the squad.
Hugo Sochurek.note: Czechia's teenage midfield wildcard, able to receive under pressure, pass forward early, and change the team's rhythm.
Hugo Sochurek.noteZh: 雨果·索胡雷克是捷克年轻中场变数，能在压力下接球、提前向前传，并改变球队节奏。

Jan Kuchta.note: Czechia's hard-running forward, useful for pressing centre-backs, attacking channels, and keeping defenders busy near Schick.
Jan Kuchta.noteZh: 扬·库赫塔是捷克勤跑型前锋，能压迫中卫、冲击通道，并在希克身边牵制后卫。

Jaroslav Zeleny.summary: Jaroslav Zelený is a Czechia defender from Sparta Prague who can cover centre-back or left-back and gives the squad experienced defensive balance.
Jaroslav Zeleny.note: Czechia's experienced left-side defender, useful for back-three balance, aerial duels, and closing games with structure.
Jaroslav Zeleny.noteZh: 雅罗斯拉夫·泽莱尼是捷克经验丰富的左侧防守者，能平衡三中卫体系、争顶，并用结构收住比赛。

Jindrich Stanek.note: Czechia's commanding goalkeeper, giving them reflex saves, box control, and clear defensive communication.
Jindrich Stanek.noteZh: 因德日赫·斯塔涅克是捷克指挥型门将，能提供反应扑救、禁区控制和清晰防线沟通。

Ladislav Krejci.note: Czechia's left-footed defensive leader, combining centre-back security with set-piece danger and midfield edge.
Ladislav Krejci.noteZh: 拉迪斯拉夫·克雷伊奇是捷克左脚防线领袖，能兼具中卫安全感、定位球威胁和中场硬度。

Lukas Cerv.note: Czechia's central disruptor, winning loose balls, pressing counters early, and moving the first pass forward.
Lukas Cerv.noteZh: 卢卡什·切尔夫是捷克中路破坏者，能抢下松散球权、提前压制反击，并把第一脚传球向前送。

Lukas Hornicek.summary: Lukáš Horníček is a Czechia goalkeeper from Braga who adds a young, high-upside shot-stopping option to the squad.
Lukas Hornicek.note: Czechia's young goalkeeper option, bringing quick reactions, modern footwork, and long-term upside behind the senior keepers.
Lukas Hornicek.noteZh: 卢卡什·霍尔尼切克是捷克年轻门将选择，能在主力门将身后提供快速反应、现代脚下技术和长期潜力。

Lukas Provod.note: Czechia's left-footed connector, giving them wide delivery, midfield balance, and late runs into shooting zones.
Lukas Provod.noteZh: 卢卡什·普罗沃德是捷克左脚连接点，能提供边路传球、中场平衡，并后插上进入射门区域。

Matej Kovar.note: Czechia's modern goalkeeper, comfortable stepping high, passing short under pressure, and making reaction saves.
Matej Kovar.noteZh: 马捷伊·科瓦日是捷克现代型门将，能高位出击、在压力下短传，并完成反应扑救。

Michal Sadilek.note: Czechia's balance midfielder, helping circulation with his left foot and adding pressing work around second balls.
Michal Sadilek.noteZh: 米哈尔·萨迪莱克是捷克平衡型中场，能用左脚帮助传导，并围绕第二落点增加压迫。

Mojmir Chytil.note: Czechia's target-forward option, useful for aerial pressure, holding up direct balls, and finishing from crowded areas.
Mojmir Chytil.noteZh: 莫伊米尔·希蒂尔是捷克支点前锋选择，能施加空中压力、背身拿住直传，并在拥挤区域终结。

Patrik Schick.note: Czechia's headline finisher, dangerous with left-footed shots, clever box timing, and chances that barely look open.
Patrik Schick.noteZh: 帕特里克·希克是捷克头号终结者，左脚射门、禁区时机和半机会把握都很有威胁。

Pavel Sulc.note: Czechia's attacking midfield runner, arriving beyond the striker, combining quickly, and adding real goal threat from deep.
Pavel Sulc.noteZh: 帕维尔·舒尔茨是捷克前腰跑动点，能越过前锋接应、快速配合，并从较深位置增加得分威胁。

Robin Hranac.note: Czechia's mobile centre-back, helping them recover behind the line, win aerial duels, and pass cleanly into midfield.
Robin Hranac.noteZh: 罗宾·赫拉纳奇是捷克机动中卫，能在防线身后回追、赢下空中对抗，并干净传入中场。

Stepan Chaloupek.note: Czechia's defensive depth piece, able to cover centre-back or midfield while adding aerial clearances.
Stepan Chaloupek.noteZh: 什捷潘·哈卢佩克是捷克防守深度选择，能覆盖中卫或中场位置，并增加空中解围。

Tomas Chory.note: Czechia's physical striker option, changing the game with aerial knockdowns, box presence, and direct service.
Tomas Chory.noteZh: 托马什·霍里是捷克身体型中锋选择，能通过头球摆渡、禁区存在感和直接传球改变比赛。

Tomas Holes.note: Czechia's experienced utility defender, useful at centre-back, right-back, or midfield when the game needs control.
Tomas Holes.noteZh: 托马什·霍莱什是捷克经验丰富的多面防守者，比赛需要控制时可踢中卫、右后卫或中场。

Tomas Soucek.note: Czechia's aerial midfield force, built for late box runs, set-piece pressure, and turning direct play into chances.
Tomas Soucek.noteZh: 托马什·绍切克是捷克空中型中场力量，擅长后插上进禁区、定位球压迫，并把直接打法转化为机会。

Vladimir Coufal.note: Czechia's veteran right-back, giving them tough wide defending, early crosses, and edge in physical matchups.
Vladimir Coufal.noteZh: 弗拉迪米尔·曹法尔是捷克老将右后卫，能提供强硬边路防守、早传中和身体对抗中的硬度。

Vladimir Darida.note: Czechia's veteran tempo manager, useful for short passing, calming frantic spells, and guiding younger midfielders.
Vladimir Darida.noteZh: 弗拉迪米尔·达里达是捷克老将节奏管理者，能短传控节奏、平息混乱阶段，并带动年轻中场。
